news.t: How ATFV Navigates the AI Infrastructure Boom

holdings.infoBox: ATFV is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.81%, Nebius Group at 9.15%, Alphabet at 9.06%, Western Digital at 6.48%, and Amazon.com at 6.40%.

overview.description: The Alger 35 ETF (ATFV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed ETF that holds a concentrated portfolio of global growth stocks. Holdings are drawn from the best ideas of the Alger fundamental research group. ATFV was launched on May 3, 2021 and is issued by Alger.

data.title: How ATFV Navigates the AI Infrastructure Boom
data.text: As markets change, investors are increasingly looking toward high-conviction, active vehicles like the Alger 35 ETF (ATFV) to find companies adapting to disruptive shifts and creating lasting value. A...
